'''Hrasskis''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Hrasskis system/Legends|Hrasskis system]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Hrasskis (species)|Hrasskis]] [[Species/Legends|species]].

Hrasskis was member of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] at the time of the [[Black Fleet Crisis]] and represented at the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] by [[Cian Marook]].

*''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{1stm}}
